description: A customer has negotiated a new, lower price for a high-volume product. This needs to be updated in their contract.

nodes.task_description: Find the customer's pricing agreement or contract in the system.

expected_outcome.value: Agent retrieves the customer's current contract.

nodes.task_description: Create an amendment to the contract, updating the price for the specific product.

expected_outcome.value: Agent drafts an amendment with the new pricing.

nodes.task_description: Send the contract amendment to the customer for their signature to formalize the new pricing.

expected_outcome.value: Agent sends the document for signature.
